story.text: **The Dual Agent.** Protection + Delegation only — the minimal Swordsman/Mage pair.

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 3 = 60): [[Artefact 60 — Unnamed]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 4 — Unnamed]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
